sections.section_purpose: To provide a high-level overview of the proposal, including key details and commitments.
sections.response_guidance: Include an overview of the scope of the Work Order, the Work Order Price, the overall Prescribed ACE Percentage, the Work Order duration, forecast completion date, and identification of the SICPs, Critical Industrial Capabilities, and DRAICs and other AIAs applicable to the Work Order.

sections.section_purpose: To demonstrate the supplier's understanding of the requirements and how they will be met.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the supplier's approach to meeting the requirements, including strategies for industry engagement, market testing, subcontract establishment, and commitments to Indigenous and veteran employment. Include details on the supplier's procurement processes, commercial requirements, and assurance activities.
